---
title: '@ Starbucks SLK'
date: '2015-05-05T12:26:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3500750319714174681'
blogger_filename: '/2015/05/starbucks-slk.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'prayer'
  - 'Journal'
---

Dear God,<br />
<br />
Why? I'm mad at you today... in fact I've been disappointed and/or mad at you for years. You know why, and I don't know what to do about it.<br />
<br />
Thank you for putting friends like Jack and Allen into my life. At least I feel a little less alone.<br />
<br />
Why can't I trust you like I want to?<br />
<br />
Why can't I move mountains and see miracles?<br />
<br />
Why don't I love my family and wife like I should?<br />
<br />
Why can't I be ....<br />
<br />
<br />
Amy Grant: I have decided, being good is just a fable. I just can't because I'm not able. I'm going to leave it to the Lord. I have decided.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
